pages.title: Void Pearl
pages.text: A remnant of darkness, decay, and survival that should not be possible. The Pearl grows strongest where light weakens and death starts to lose its claim.

pages.title: Stages
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Grants airless survival, regularly strips harmful effects, inflicts withering decay on strikes, and has a chance to deny a lethal blow. Even half-asleep, it already refuses clean endings.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): Harmful effects are cleared faster and the Pearl grows more reliable at refusing death.

pages.title: Stages Continued
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): In low light, nearby enemies begin suffering $(thing)Hollow Dominion$(), a field of decay, weakness, and exposure.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): The bearer hits harder in darkness and the Pearl becomes even harder to kill through.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): The aura spreads wider and punishes more harshly.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): The Pearl reaches its fullest hunger, with the strongest darkness aura, the best death-denial chance, and a burst of Strength while the bearer stands in low light.
